morales_pipeline_files: pipelines/Morales_et_all/Snakefile (21 lines, no container_for, no SIF_DIR)
pipelines/Morales_et_all/downstream.smk (5 rules, 0 container/log/resources, bare 'python Downstream/*.py' paths)
codebase_findings.canonical_pattern_source: pipelines/editing_wgs/Snakefile lines 14-25 (container_for) and rna_editing.smk lines 6-29 (rule with container/log/resources/threads)

container_install_paths_verified.jacusa2: /opt/jacusa2/jacusa2.jar (ENTRYPOINT java -jar; do not rely on entrypoint, call java -jar explicitly)
container_install_paths_verified.reditools: reditools.py at /opt/reditools2/src/cineca/reditools.py on PATH; Python 2.7 image; numpy 1.16.6, pysam 0.15.4
container_install_paths_verified.wgs: samtools, bcftools, bwa, tabix on PATH (apt install ubuntu:22.04)

codebase_findings.validate_container_script: scripts/validate_containers.sh — uses TOOLS env var; expects containers/<tool>/Dockerfile and validate.sh; runs validate-<tool> inside the SIF
codebase_findings.tscc_profile: profiles/tscc2/config.yaml uses software-deployment-method: apptainer; default mem_mb=20000, runtime=30; partition=condo; account=csd792
codebase_findings.downstream_submodule: Benchmark-of-RNA-Editing-Detection-Tools/ exists as empty submodule (verified by ls)

pattern_inventory.resources_pattern: mem_mb=lambda wildcards, attempt: BASE * (1.5 ** (attempt - 1)), runtime=lambda wildcards, attempt: BASE * (2 ** (attempt - 1))
pattern_inventory.shell_safety: set -euo pipefail at top of any multi-command or piped shell block
pattern_inventory.dockerfile_conventions: WORKDIR /work; LABEL title+description; tool wrappers in /usr/local/bin/; validate.sh -> /usr/local/bin/validate-<tool> with exit 0
pattern_inventory.log_redirection: 1> {log.stdout} 2> {log.stderr} appended to shell commands (some rules use 2>> for append)

high: RED-ML Dockerfile: requires Perl 5 + R + R packages (caret, data.table, ROCR, randomForest); base image and CRAN package install reliability
Mark_duplicates wrapper substitution: Failure to call /usr/local/bin/picard wrapper (rather than java -jar) breaks the rule
medium: FASTX-Toolkit availability via bioconda for amd64 — generally available but can break
STAR base image choice: must be standalone (do not depend on lodei.sif)
downstream submodule emptiness — pipeline dry-run still passes but execution fails; only mitigation is config.yaml comment
low: Resource lambda exponential backoff producing very large mem_mb on attempt=4 (1.5^3 = 3.375x); SLURM partitions may reject
samtools_calmd output format ambiguity (SAM vs BAM); preserve current behavior to avoid breaking change
EC-9 (sprint Python 2.7 container) is inherited, not introduced

hotspot_integration: Hotspot list contains only test/script files unrelated to Morales pipeline; no high-churn .smk files. No additional review burden from hotspots.
